title: Thenkurangaduthurai Temple
tagline: Thenkurangaduthurai Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Abathsahayeswarar Temple, Aduthurai (also calledTen Kurangaadutrai Temple, Aduthurai) is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva located in the village of Aduthurai, Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: Abathsahayeswarar Temple, Aduthurai (also calledTen Kurangaadutrai Temple, Aduthurai) is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva located in the village of Aduthurai, Tamil Nadu, India. Shiva is worshipped as Apathsaheswarar, and is represented by the lingam. His consort Parvati is depicted as Prabhavalli. The presiding deity is revered in the 7th century Tamil Saiva canonical work, the Tevaram, written by Tamil saint poets known as the nayanars and classified as Paadal Petra Sthalam.

topPlaces.name: Vilwaneswarar Temple
topPlaces.description: Vilwavaneswarar Temple (also called Tiruvaikavur Temple or Thiruvaikavur Temple) is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva located in Thiruvaikavur, Tamil Nadu, India. The temple is located 8 km (5.0 mi) north of Kumbakonam, on the southern bank of Kollidam.

topPlaces.name: Tiruvaikavur
topPlaces.description: Thiruvaikavur is a village in the Papanasam taluk of Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India. The village is famous for the Tiruvaikavur temple.

topPlaces.name: Thiru Aadanoor Temple
topPlaces.description: The Thiru Aadanoor or the Andalakkum Aiyan Perumal Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Vishnu located in Aadanoor, Thanjavur district in Tamil Nadu, India. Constructed in Dravidian style of architecture, the temple is glorified in the Nalayira Divya Prabandham, the early medieval Tamil canon of the Alvar saints from the 6th–9th centuries CE. It is counted as one among the 108 Divya Desams dedicated to Vishnu.

topPlaces.name: Olaipadi
topPlaces.description: Olaipadi is a village in the Papanasam taluk of Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India. The village is situated on the northern side four km from Swamimalai near Kumbakonam and one km northeast from Adhanur, one of the 108 Divyadesams, has a temple for Lord Vishnu.

topPlaces.name: Sathambadi
topPlaces.description: Sathambadi is a village in the Udayarpalayam Taluk of Ariyalur district, Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Thirupullabhoothangudi Temple
topPlaces.description: Thirupullabhoothangudi Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Vishnu located in Pullabhoothangudi near Kumbakonam in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Constructed in South Indian Style of Architecture, the temple is glorified in the Nalayira Divya Prabandham, the early medieval Tamil canon of the Alvar saints from the 6th–9th centuries CE. It is counted as one among the 108 Divya Desams dedicated to Vishnu.

topPlaces.name: Ganga Jadadisvarar Temple
topPlaces.description: The Ganga Jadadisvarar Temple (also known as the Govindaputhur Gangajatatheeswarar Temple) is a Hindu temple located in the village of Govindaputtur, Ariyalur District, Tamil Nadu, India. Saint Appar and Sambandar who lived during the period of Mahendravarma Pallava praised the deity of the temple in their Devaram hymns.

topPlaces.name: Innambur
topPlaces.description: Innambur is a village in the Kumbakonam taluk of Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India.

Constructed in Dravidian style of architecture, the temple is glorified in the Nalayira Divya Prabandham, the early medieval Tamil canon of the Alvar saints from the 6th–9th centuries CE. It is counted as one among the 108 Divya Desams dedicated to Vishnu.

Olaipadi is a village in the Papanasam taluk of Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India. The village is situated on the northern side four km from Swamimalai near Kumbakonam and one km northeast from Adhanur, one of the 108 Divyadesams, has a temple for Lord Vishnu.
Sathambadi is a village in the Udayarpalayam Taluk of Ariyalur district, Tamil Nadu, India.

Thirupullabhoothangudi Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Vishnu located in Pullabhoothangudi near Kumbakonam in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Constructed in South Indian Style of Architecture, the temple is glorified in the Nalayira Divya Prabandham, the early medieval Tamil canon of the Alvar saints from the 6th–9th centuries CE. It is counted as one among the 108 Divya Desams dedicated to Vishnu.

The Ganga Jadadisvarar Temple (also known as the Govindaputhur Gangajatatheeswarar Temple) is a Hindu temple located in the village of Govindaputtur, Ariyalur District, Tamil Nadu, India. Saint Appar and Sambandar who lived during the period of Mahendravarma Pallava praised the deity of the temple in their Devaram hymns.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Thenkurangaduthurai Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Thenkurangaduthurai Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Thenkurangaduthurai Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (70 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (70 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Thenkurangaduthurai Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Thenkurangaduthurai Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Thenkurangaduthurai Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Thenkurangaduthurai Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Thenkurangaduthurai Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Vilwaneswarar Temple, Tiruvaikavur, Thiru Aadanoor Temple, Olaipadi, Sathambadi.
